title: LootTableDef
description: Weighted loot table (plan/02 §5). Each roll picks one eligible entry by weight; entries may grant an item (amount = formula, dice allowed), recurse into another table, or grant nothing (weight-only entry).

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

rolls.description: How many independent picks one Roll() performs.
